title: rumohra simplicior
intro: Rumohra simplicior, also known as the Maidenhair fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rumohra simplicior include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and acting as an anti-inflammatory agent for skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Rumohra simplicior include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
